PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/api/mixmatch/paint-colors' -Method Get -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { "ERROR=$\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "STATUS=$\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); if \($stream\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/api/mixmatch/paint-colors' -Method Get -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "OK=$\($json.ok\)"; "COUNT=$\($json.items.Count\)"; if \($json.items.Count -gt 0\) { $json.items[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } } catch { "ERROR=$\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "STATUS=$\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); if \($stream\) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } } })

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const mix=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/mixmatch.js','utf8'\); const wiz=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/wizard.js','utf8'\); if \(!mix.includes\('generateImageFromImages\('\)\) throw new Error\('mixmatch generate is not using image-to-image'\); if \(wiz.includes\('generateImageFromThreeServices\(prompt'\)\) throw new Error\('wizard no-sample branch still uses text-to-image services'\); console.log\('routes use image-to-image'\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const mix=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/mixmatch.js','utf8'\); const wiz=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/wizard.js','utf8'\); if \(!mix.includes\('generateImageFromImages\('\)\) throw new Error\('mixmatch generate is not using image-to-image'\); if \(mix.includes\('generateImageExternal\('\)\) throw new Error\('mixmatch still calls text-to-image generation'\); if \(wiz.includes\('generateImageFromThreeServices\(prompt'\)\) throw new Error\('wizard no-sample branch still uses text-to-image services'\); console.log\('routes use image-to-image'\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const svc=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/services/external-ai.js','utf8'\); const mix=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/mixmatch.js','utf8'\); const wiz=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/wizard.js','utf8'\); if \(!svc.includes\('generateImageWithSD35Server'\)\) throw new Error\('missing SD35 provider'\); if \(!svc.includes\('generateImageWithStabilityImageToImage'\)\) throw new Error\('missing Stability image-to-image provider'\); if \(!svc.includes\(\\"selectedProvider === 'hq'\\"\)\) throw new Error\('missing selected HQ branch'\); if \(!mix.includes\('provider }'\)\) throw new Error\('mixmatch does not pass provider'\); if \(!wiz.includes\('provider }'\)\) throw new Error\('wizard does not pass provider'\); console.log\('provider selection wired'\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const svc=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/services/external-ai.js','utf8'\); const mix=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/mixmatch.js','utf8'\); const wiz=fs.readFileSync\('backend/src/routes/wizard.js','utf8'\); if \(!svc.includes\('generateImageWithSD35Server'\)\) throw new Error\('missing SD35 provider'\); if \(!svc.includes\('generateImageWithStabilityImageToImage'\)\) throw new Error\('missing Stability image-to-image provider'\); if \(!svc.includes\('selectedProvider'\)\) throw new Error\('missing selected provider branches'\); if \(!mix.includes\('{ provider }'\)\) throw new Error\('mixmatch does not pass provider'\); if \(!wiz.includes\('{ provider }'\)\) throw new Error\('wizard does not pass provider'\); console.log\('provider selection wired'\);")
